title: IusIntegra - Legal Services
body: Project focused on legal usability. Informational clarity and architecture optimization under Digital Kit standards. - **Frontend WordPress** developed with **native Gutenberg blocks** in React, without third party page builders. - **100% custom design**: modular structure, reusable components, and modern CSS style optimized by Core Web Vitals. - **Technical SEO** and accessibility: semantic tagging, clear navigation, and fast loading. - **Responsive**: adapted to mobile, tablet and desktop. - **Digital Kit**: compliance with official requirements for digital aids. **Source code:** [github.com/xarop/iusintegra](https://github.com/xarop/iusintegra) **Website:** [iusintegra.es] (https://iusintegra.es)
